info.title: Osirion Fortnite Public API
info.description:
This is the Osirion Fortnite API.

This API is unofficial and is not endorsed by or affiliated with Epic Games, Inc. Fortnite and related assets are trademarks and intellectual property of their respective owners.
For full legal terms and usage information, see: https://osirion.gg/legal/license.

Rate limits:
- Account-related endpoint: 50 req/min.
- Anything else: 100 req/min.

The API is currently in beta. For you, that means:
  - Response times are a known bottleneck.
  - Cosmetic shop history coverage currently starts in 2025.
  - API keys will be added in the future, allowing:
    - Higher rate limits.
    - Access to account-related endpoints. Note that these endpoints are open in beta.

For support or other questions join our discord at https://discord.gg/osirion.

Feature Comparison:

| Feature                        | FortniteApi.io  | Fortnite-API.com | Osirion        |
| ------------------------------ | --------------- | ---------------- | -------------- |
| Localization                   | ✅              | ✅               | ✅             |
| Different Image Sizes          | ✅              | ✅               | ✅             |
| Cosmetics                      | ✅              | ✅               | ✅             |
| Cosmetics Search               | ❌              | ✅               | ✅             |
| Cosmetics Banners              | ❌              | ✅               | ✅             |
| Cosmetics (Upcoming)           | ⚠️ outdated     | ❌               | ✅             |
| Cosmetic Sets                  | ✅              | ✅               | ✅             |
| Cosmetic Introduction          | ❌              | ✅               | ✅             |
| Cosmetic Series                | ✅              | ✅               | ✅             |
| Cosmetic Shop History          | ✅              | ✅               | ✅ 2025-now    |
| Battle Pass                    | ⚠️ outdated     | ❌               | ✅             |
| OG, Lego, Festival Pass        | ❌              | ❌               | ✅             |
| Crew data                      | ✅              | ❌               | ✅             |
| POIs, Map (BR)                 | ✅              | ✅               | ✅             |
| POIs, Map (OG, Reload, Blitz)  | ❌              | ❌               | ✅             |
| Item Shop                      | ✅              | ✅               | ✅             |
| Item Shop Best Sellers         | ❌              | ❌               | ✅             |
| Item Shop Real Money Bundles   | ✅              | ❌               | ✅             |
| Account Lookup                 | ✅              | ❌               | ✅             |
| Account Lookup (Bulk)          | ❌              | ❌               | ✅             |
| Account stats (lifetime)       | ✅              | ✅               | ✅             |
| Account stats (current season) | ❌              | ✅               | ✅             |
| Account ranked data            | ✅              | ❌               | ✅             |
| Ranked modes data              | ❌              | ❌               | ✅             |
| News                           | ✅              | ✅               | ✅             |
| News personalized per Island   | ❌              | ❌               | ✅             |
| Tournaments                    | ⚠️ limited data | ❌               | ✅             |
| Tournaments Leaderboards       | ⚠️ limited data | ❌               | ✅             |
| Weapons                        | ✅              | ❌               | ✅             |
| Weapons spawn chances          | ⚠️ outdated     | ❌               | ❌ not planned |
| Playlists (Game modes)         | ✅              | ✅               | ✅             |
| Creative island lookup         | ⚠️ limited      | ❌               | ✅             |
| Creative island lookup (Bulk)  | ❌              | ❌               | ✅             |
| Creative Discovery             | ⚠️ limited      | ❌               | ✅             |
| Creative Discovery Pages       | ⚠️ limited      | ❌               | ✅             |
| Creator code lookup            | ✅              | ✅               | ✅             |
| Vehicle Stats                  | ⚠️ limited      | ❌               | ❌             |
| Twitch drops                   | ✅              | ❌               | ❌             |
| Rarities (deprecated by Epic)  | ✅              | ❌               | ❌             |
| Quests                         | ⚠️ outdated     | ❌               | ✅             |
| Augments                       | ✅              | ❌               | ✅             |
| AES / Build info               | ❌              | ✅               | ✅             |

get.description: Get tournament data in fnpubapi format

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Optional region filter

parameters.description: Include events older than 3 months, currently historic data goes back to mid 2024 until we have imported legacy tournament data

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: The language of the tournaments data

parameters.name: leaderboardEventId
parameters.description: The leaderboard event id

parameters.name: leaderboardEventWindowId
parameters.description: The leaderboard event window id

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The zero-based page index

get.description: Get fortnite account lifetime stats data

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: The account id whose stats to fetch

parameters.name: timeframe
parameters.description: The timeframe of the stats, defaults to current season

errorMessage.description: A human readable message of the error

AccountDisplayName.description: Represents an Epic account display name

AccountLookupBulkQuery.description: A bulk account lookup query by account ids (maximum 100)

AccountLookupBulkDataResponse.description: Successful bulk account lookup response object

accounts.description: The account lookup entries in the same order as requested account ids

AccountLookupByDisplayNameDataResponse.description: Successful display name account lookup response object

accountId.description: Account id of the first matched account, deprecated in favor of the <accounts> field and will be removed in a future version

accountDetails.description: Account names of the first matched account, deprecated in favor of the <accounts> field and will be removed in a future version

affiliate.description: The affiliate data, or null if the affiliate could not be found

AesDynamicPak.description: A single dynamic AES key entry

fileCount.description: Number of gamefiles included in this pak

AccountLookupBulkEntry.description: A single bulk account lookup result for a requested account id

accountDetails.description: The matched account details, or null when the account could not be found

AccountLookupExternalDisplayNames.description: The display names of linked external platform accounts

modes.description: The ranked progress for all modes

lastUpdatedAt.description: When the account last progressed his rank, or null when the player has not played this mode

currentDivision.description: The current rank of the player in the season, or null when the player has not played this mode

highestDivision.description: The highest rank the player has been during the season, or null when the player has not played this mode

promotionProgress.description: Percentage (0 - 100) when the account progresses to the next division

currentPlayerRanking.description: When the player is unreal, then this is their unreal rank

divisionGroupName.description: The human readable division group name

modeName.description: The display name of the mode

seasonNameShort.description: The display name of the season

seasonStart.description: The start timestamp of the ranked season

seasonEnd.description: The end timestamp of the ranked season

divisionGroupName.description: The human readable division group name

id.description: Represents the id of the news entry

teaserTitle.description: The teaser title of this news entry

teaserImage.description: The teaser image of this news entry

title.description: The details (full screen) title of this news entry

body.description: The details (full screen) body content of this news entry

image.description: The details (full screen) image of this news entry

communityPostId.description: The optional id of the related community post, ommited if not applicable

CosmeticsSearchMatchType.description: The matching strategy used for string filters

CosmeticsSearchQuery.description: Supported query parameters for cosmetics search

introductionSeason.description: Filter by cosmetic introduction season id

hasVariants.description: Filter by whether cosmetics have variants

GlobalCCU.description: The global concurrent player count for this link, only populated on supported endpoints with the includeCCU=true query parameter, otherwise -1

linkType.description: TODO: decide if we only want to allow certain link types (ugc?) (if so, make this an enum)

tagline.description: The localized tagline, usually a description of the link code

introduction.description: The localized introduction, usually not used anymore in favor of the tagline

imageUrl.description: The localized main image representing the link code

lobbyBackgroundImageUrl.description: The localized background image, if the the link code specifies a custom lobby background

extraImageUrls.description: Some epic owned link codes have extra showcase images

rotations.description: Maps by epic might have multiple maps, this represents the localized rotation of those maps

countdowns.description: Maps by epic might have a countdown to an live event or another release

relatedLinkCodes.description: Related link codes, for epic owned link codes such as experiences or mode sets

LinkCodeDataExtraImageEntry.description: Represents an extra image entry for a link code

LinkCodeDataRotationEntry.description: Represents a rotation entry for a link code

durationSec.description: The duration of the rotation entry in seconds

LinkCodeDataCountdownEntry.description: Represents a countdown entry for a link code

LinkCodeDataRelationEntry.description: Represents a relation between two link codes

relationTypes.description: The relation types between the two link codes, there can be multiple relation types

LinkCodeDataRelationType.description: The relation type between two link codes

links.description: The link codes data for the requested link codes (only includes successful lookups)

DiscoverySurfacePageDataResponse.description: Successful discovery surface page response object

panels.description: The panels of the discovery surface

id.description: The internal id of the panel

displayName.description: The display name of the panel

subTitle.description: The optional subtitle of the panel

featureTags.description: The feature tags of the panel, specifying how the panel is displayed ingame

DiscoverySurfacePanelPage.description: Represents a discovery surface panel page

hasMore.description: Whether there are more pages after this one

nextPageToken.description: The next page token, required to fetch more pages, only populated if hasMore is true

DiscoverySurfacePanelPageEntry.description: Represents a discovery surface panel page entry

gameplayTags.description: The gameplay tags of the augment

name.description: The display name of the weapon

description.description: The display description of the weapon

imageUrl.description: The large image url of the weapon

smallImageUrl.description: The small image url of the weapon

gameplayTags.description: The gameplay tags of the weapon

SeasonPassDataResponse.description: Successful single season pass response object

modeId.description: The internal mode identifier of this season pass

passName.description: The localized pass name, if available

seasonName.description: The localized season name, if available

seasonStart.description: The estimated season pass start timestamp

seasonEnd.description: The estimated season pass end timestamp

streamedContent.description: Streamed storefront content metadata for this season pass, if available

minLevel.description: Minimum level requirement for this pass

price.description: The standard pass purchase price in V-Bucks, or null when not purchasable

bundlePrice.description: The bundle purchase price in V-Bucks, if available

levelPrice.description: The single level purchase price in V-Bucks, if available

levelBundlePrice.description: The level bundle purchase price in V-Bucks, if available

categories.description: The category groups of this season pass

SeasonPassStreamedContent.description: Additional season pass content served from CMS

purchaseBackgroundURL.description: The season pass purchase background image URL

purchaseConfirmBackgroundURL.description: The season pass purchase confirmation background image URL

seasonEndDateTime.description: Season pass end date text from CMS

pages.description: The pages within this season pass category

SeasonPassCategoryPage.description: Represents a season pass category page

entries.description: The page entries for this season pass page

SeasonPassCategoryPageRewardEntry.description: Represents a reward entry in a season pass page

tileSize.description: The UI tile size of this entry

rewards.description: The granted rewards for this offer

SeasonPassCategoryPageRewardOffer.description: Store offer metadata for a reward entry

isFreeReward.description: Whether the reward is available on the free track

SeasonPassCategoryPageQuestEntry.description: Represents a quest entry in a season pass page

tileSize.description: The UI tile size of this entry

rewards.description: The granted rewards for this quest

SeasonPassCategoryPageQuestData.description: Quest metadata for a quest entry

SeasonPassReward.description: Represents one granted season pass reward item

item.description: Resolved cosmetic data for the reward item, or null when unresolved

MapModeDataResponse.description: Successful single map mode response object

minimapUrl.description: The map minimap image url, or null when no minimap is available

sizeCm.description: The map minimap size in centimeters

pois.description: The list of points of interest for this map

MapPoi.description: Represents a point of interest on a map

locationTag.description: The internal localization tag for this POI

scheduleId.description: The internal quest bundle schedule id, if available

name.description: The localized quest bundle display name, if available

category.description: The resolved quest category metadata, if available

quests.description: The list of quests in this bundle

QuestCategory.description: Represents quest category metadata for a bundle

displayName.description: The localized category display name, if available

longDisplayName.description: The localized long category display name, if available

description.description: The localized category description, if available

sortOrder.description: The category sort order used in frontend quest listings

defaultHeaderSortOrder.description: The default header sort order within this category

additionalHeaders.description: Additional quest headers configured for this category

QuestCategoryHeader.description: Represents an additional quest category header

name.description: The localized header display name, if available

description.description: The localized header description, if available

sortOrder.description: The display sort order of this header

defaultGroupSortOrder.description: The default group sort order for header groups in this header

QuestCategoryHeaderGroup.description: Represents one quest header group entry

sortOrder.description: The display sort order of this group

QuestBundleQuest.description: Represents one quest entry inside a quest bundle

unlockedAt.description: The resolved UTC unlock date-time of this quest, if available

unlockedAtType.description: The internal quest unlock type identifier

expiresAt.description: The resolved UTC expiration date-time of this quest, if available

expiresAtType.description: The internal quest expire type identifier

quest.description: The resolved quest details, if available

Quest.description: Represents a quest definition with localized metadata

displayName.description: The localized quest display name, if available

description.description: The localized quest description, if available

shortDescription.description: The localized short quest description, if available

rewards.description: The reward list granted by this quest

hudShortDescription.description: The localized HUD objective description, if available

description.description: The localized objective description, if available

requiredTemplateId.description: The required template id needed to unlock this reward, only present when required

requiredItem.description: The resolved required item details, present only when requiredTemplateId is set, or null when unresolved

grantedItem.description: The resolved granted item details, or null when unresolved

displayName.description: The display name of the playlist

displaySubName.description: The display sub name of the playlist

maxSquadSize.description: The maximum number of players inside a squad (not team, a team can consist of multiple squads)

maxTeamSize.description: The maximum number of players inside a team (a team can consist of multiple squads)

lang.description: The language used by the upstream item shop endpoint

bestSellers.description: Best seller data grouped by region

offerName.description: The display name of the offer

offerType.description: The offer type, used for visualization

primaryId.description: The primary item template id of the offer

bundleId.description: The internal bundle id, if available

devName.description: The internal development name of the offer

outDate.description: The date when this offer leaves the shop

inDate.description: The date when this offer entered the shop

tileSize.description: The tile size how this offer should be displayed

items.description: The granted items for this offer

presentations.description: Optional presentation images for this offer, might not be available

layoutId.description: The layout id used for grouping this offer

layout.description: The resolved layout metadata for this offer

webUrl.description: Optional external web url for this offer, use with caution, epic sometimes populates the wrong urls here

giftingEnabled.description: Whether gifting is enabled for this offer

sortPriority.description: Sort priority of the offer within the layout section

ItemShopOfferItem.description: Represents a granted item inside an offer

itemDetails.description: Detailed cosmetic data for the granted item, if available

ItemShopOfferPrice.description: The vbucks price data of an offer

floorPrice.description: The minimum possible vbucks price for dynamic bundles

text.description: The display text of the offer tag
The display text of the banner

intensity.description: The banner intensity, values from EViolatorIntensity: Low, Medium, High, Urgent

productTag.description: The product tag this presentation applies to. For example to use display images for lego vs. br.

ItemShopOfferColors.description: Theme color metadata for an offer

ItemShopOfferLayout.description: Resolved layout metadata for an offer

displayName.description: The display name of this layout section

ItemShopOfferLayoutBackground.description: Background configuration for a layout section

type.description: The background type, values from EFortItemShopBackgroundType: Light, Dark

customTexture.description: The custom texture id or path

ItemShopOfferLayoutOfferGroup.description: Offer group metadata inside a layout section

displayType.description: How offers in this group are displayed, values from EFortItemShopOfferDisplayType: TileGrid, ExpandableList, Billboard, ScrollableList

textureMetadata.description: Texture url metadata entries by key

stackRanks.description: Stack rank used for dynamic offer ordering

ItemShopOfferLayoutOfferGroupStackRank.description: Stack rank metadata entry for an item shop offer group

productTag.description: Product tag this stack rank applies to

startDate.description: Timestamp when this stack rank becomes active

ItemShopBestSellerRegion.description: Best seller data for a region

region.description: Region id or 'GLOBAL' for global best sellers

offerIds.description: Offer ids ordered by bestseller ranking

RealMoneyBundlesDataResponse.description: Successful real money bundles response object

lang.description: The language used by the upstream real money bundles endpoint

RealMoneyBundleOffer.description: Represents a real money bundle offer

mcpOfferId.description: The offer id from MCP storefront data

storeOfferId.description: The offer id used by the Epic Games Store

storeOfferUrl.description: Epic Games Store product url, if available

devName.description: The MCP dev name of the offer

title.description: The localized title of the offer

description.description: The localized description of the offer

longDescription.description: The localized long description of the offer

viewableDate.description: The date when this offer becomes visible

effectiveDate.description: The date when this offer becomes active

expiryDate.description: The date when this offer expires

tileSize.description: The tile size how this offer should be displayed

sortPriority.description: Sort priority of the offer within the layout section

layoutId.description: The layout id used for grouping this offer

layout.description: The resolved layout metadata for this offer

items.description: The granted items for this offer

prices.description: Regional pricing data for this offer

RealMoneyBundleOfferImage.description: Image metadata for a real money bundle offer

RealMoneyBundleOfferPrice.description: Regional price information for a real money bundle offer

currencyDecimal.description: The decimal precision used by this currency

discountPrice.description: Discounted offer price in the local currency

originalPrice.description: Original offer price in the local currency

countries.description: Countries where the regional price applies

lang.description: The language of the crew data

nextCrewPack.description: The next month crew pack data, if available

additionalBenefits.description: Additional crew benefits grouped by category

CrewNextPack.description: Next month's fortnite crew pack data

CrewAdditionalBenefit.description: A grouped set of crew benefits

templateId.description: Optional template id associated with this benefit, used by specific benefit types such as battle passes

itemDetails.description: Detailed cosmetic data for the granted item, if available

gameplayTags.description: The gameplay tags of this cosmetic

shopHistory.description: Known item shop appearance dates for this cosmetic. Note: coverage currently starts in 2025.

name.description: The display name of the cosmetic series
The display name of the set

partOf.example: Part of the Black Panther set.

name.description: The display name of the rarity

CosmeticIntroduction.description: Represents introduction metadata for a cosmetic

options.description: The selectable options for this variant channel

CosmeticVariantOption.description: Represents a single cosmetic variant option

page.description: The current page of the leaderboard

totalPages.description: The total number of pages of the leaderboard, capped to 100

updatedAt.description: When the leaderboard was last updated

entries.description: The entries of the leaderboard for this page

players.description: The players in this team, some players might be hidden due to privacy settings, so these cannot be included here

StatsGroupedByInput.description: Represents stats grouped by input type

StatsGroupedByTeamSize.description: Represents stats grouped by team size
